args.code: (() => { const btn = document.querySelector('button[data-testid=dns-record-add-button]') || [...document.querySelectorAll('button')].find(b => b.textContent && b.textContent.includes('Add record')); if (btn) { btn.click(); return {clicked: true, text: btn.textContent.trim().substring(0,50)}; } return {clicked: false}; })()
